summary: Checked the running c02 Ramsey/T2star scout; bridge job nv23_ramsey_20260514_201034_auto_ramsey remains running with monitor active and healthy counts, so no bridge queue mutation was made. Prepared a terminal-review protocol, then raw-exported and plotted the first stored average autosave. The first-average snapshot is provisional only: visible structure is present, but low-frequency FFT components are among the strongest peaks and there is no average-to-average support yet, so no T2star or 13C claim was made. Updated evidence, backlog, work/state.md, and log.md.

next_action.reason: The Ramsey/T2star scout is still running; bridge-touching work remains blocked by bridge occupancy. Continue monitor/cron checks until terminal result or a later autosave is available, then raw-export/review before fitting or making T2star/13C claims.
